title: Token Launch Screener
description: Real-time screener for new DEX token launches — filter by minimum liquidity, chain, and pair token. Build a Dexscreener-style new pairs feed.
useCase: Build a live token launch feed that surfaces new pairs the moment they are created on any DEX, filtered by minimum liquidity threshold and sorted by chain.

keyParams.minLiquidityUsd: Minimum USD liquidity threshold to surface a new pair
keyParams.chainName: Optional chain filter — e.g. 'base-mainnet'. Omit for all chains
keyParams.pairToken: Optional base pair token filter — e.g. 'USDC' or 'WETH'
